data.title: Verizon survey shows parents use technology for Halloween safety; conducted with Morning Consult, revealing trends.
data.description: In a recent survey conducted by Verizon in partnership with Morning Consult, it was revealed that parents are relying more on technology to ensure a balance between Halloween enjoyment, their children's freedom, and their peace of mind. The study, conducted in New York on Oct. 16, 2025, highlighted the growing trend of incorporating technology into Halloween festivities. This shift indicates a shift towards utilizing digital tools to enhance safety measures during the Halloween celebrations.

data.title: Nextdata updates OS for AI era; accelerates delivery by 50×, integrating multimodal data for safe, context-rich actions.
data.description: Nextdata, a leader in autonomous data products, revealed a major update to Nextdata OS in San Francisco on Oct. 16, 2025. This update aims to unify multimodal data and boost delivery speed by 50 times. The enhancements enable secure and context-laden data-informed actions for AI agents.

data.title: Smart Vision Lights launches Configurable LSR300 linear light with interchangeable lens modifiers for customization.
data.description: In Norton Shores, Michigan on October 16, 2025, Smart Vision Lights (SVL), a prominent company specializing in creative LED lighting solutions, has unveiled the Configurable LSR300 linear light. This new product features interchangeable OptiCard lens modifiers and optic windows, allowing for diverse lighting configurations. SVL is internationally recognized for its innovative designs and manufacturing processes, setting it apart as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Vivistim co-founder named Neurological Surgeons Innovator of the Year. Navzer honored for stroke recovery system.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on October 16, 2025, MicroTransponder®, Inc., a medical technology company, revealed the Vivistim® Paired VNS™ System for chronic stroke recovery. The co-founder and chief scientific officer, Navzer, was a part of the announcement.

data.title: Beyon Cyber and Haven plan to launch advanced AI-powered SOC capabilities globally after signing MoU.
data.description: Beyon Cyber, a leading cyber security company in the Middle East and part of the Beyon Group, has recently entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Haven Cyber Technologies. Haven, a global cyber security services provider that is a Microsoft Solutions Partner, operates through its UK subsidiary ITC Secure. The MoU aims to establish a strategic partnership between Beyon Cyber and Haven. As part of this collaboration, they plan to innovate cyber security operations and services. This partnership will bring together the expertise and resources of both companies to enhance cyber security offerings. Beyon Cyber, known for its rapid growth in the region, and Haven Cyber Technologies are set to drive significant changes in the cyber security sector through this agreement.

data.title: Tether suggests two new board members for Juventus to boost strategic growth and connect with fans, as reported on tether.io.
data.description: Tether has put forward two nominees for Juventus' Board with the goal of advancing growth and innovation, along with fostering stronger connections with supporters. Full details are available on tether.io.

data.title: Airport P.A. systems at 4 airports hacked: Anti-Trump & pro-Hamas messages broadcasted. Minimal disruption reported.
data.description: Recent cybersecurity breaches at four airports in North America have sparked worries about the vulnerability of airport infrastructure. While the exact impact of the hacks was minor, they have underscored the importance of ensuring the security of noncritical yet prominent airport facilities.
US September budget outlays $346 bln vs $447 bln in September 2024 receipts $544 bln vs $527 bln in September 2024.

data.title: Record 300+ interval / tender offer funds reported by XA Investments in Q3 2025 market update, showing dominance in interval funds and increased investor accessibility.
data.description: The market for interval and tender offer funds has achieved significant milestones, with a noticeable trend towards interval fund dominance and increased accessibility for investors. This sector has seen a surge in popularity, with interval funds taking the lead and offering more options for investors. The shift towards greater accessibility means that more investors are now able to participate in this market, which has reached new heights in terms of interest and activity. This development underscores the growing importance of interval and tender offer funds, reflecting the changing preferences and needs of investors looking for diversified investment opportunities.
